description_long: This house features a modern, open-plan layout with a mix of flat and partially transparent roof sections, allowing natural light to flood the interior spaces. The property is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including trees, shrubs, and a row of palm trees at the front, which line the sidewalk and street. The front yard includes a driveway with parked cars and a gated entrance, while the backyard offers a spacious patio and additional green space. The structure is primarily composed of white and neutral-toned walls, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing visual connectivity between indoor and outdoor areas. The house appears to have multiple interconnected sections, with distinct living, dining, and private quarters, as well as covered outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a seamless integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a gated driveway lined with palm trees. The design features open-plan living spaces and a blend of indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, driveway with cars, palm trees along the sidewalk, and the main entryway to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard patio, green landscaping, and the house's open layout with visible interior sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large glass windows, and the integration of outdoor living spaces with the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional green areas, the driveway, and the house's segmented structure with multiple rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Gated main entry with a paved driveway, minimal steps, and a simple modern door flanked by glass panels and landscaping
